title: Jonesboro Spider-Man helps man in wheelchair
summary_full: A man dressed as Spider-Man assisted a person in a wheelchair crossing a busy road.  Christopher Hellenthal, returning from an event, saw the struggle and acted quickly.  Traffic cameras captured the swift rescue which unfolded in mere seconds.  The video of this real-life heroism quickly went viral online.  His spontaneous act of kindness reminded everyone about timely assistance.
